questions.q: What new authority did Florida Governor Ron DeSantis sign into law on April 7, 2026, regarding groups and student supporters?
options: The ability to label groups as terrorist organizations and expel student supporters
The ability to ban certain books from state university libraries
The authority to increase tuition fees for out-of-state students
The power to regulate social media content for state university students
questions.correctText: The ability to label groups as terrorist organizations and expel student supporters

questions.q: In what US state was the wife of a US Army staff sergeant detained, leading to an effort to halt her deportation, days after their wedding?
An American woman was reported missing on April 7, 2026, after allegedly falling overboard during a boat trip in which country?
According to reports on April 7, 2026, more than 800 people were arrested by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) following tips from what federal airport security agency?
What major US agricultural equipment manufacturer agreed to pay $99 million to settle a 'right to repair' class-action lawsuit on April 7, 2026?
